2606.14238.title: When and How Severely: Scenario-Specific Safety Envelopes for Driving VLAs
2606.14238.paper_summary: Safety certification of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) driving planners under ISO 21448 (SOTIF) rests on an Operational Design Domain (ODD) specification that answers two complementary questions: when does the planner start to fail, and how severely does it fail once it does? We evaluate Alpamayo R1, a 10B-parameter open-weight driving VLA, on 15,968 (clip, attack) pairs. We find a conservative-aggregate gap: an aggregate safe threshold of $σ\leq 50$ under a 15% average displacement error (ADE) budget masks well-sampled scenarios that tolerate the top of the tested grid ($σ= 70$). A Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) on the changed-explanation subset identifies six discrete severity bands (BIC-optimal $k{=}6$), so two perturbation conditions with the same mean error can differ materially in their share of high-severity (C4/C5) failures. Joining the two analyses on the same corpus surfaces a finding neither yields in isolation: the scenarios with the loosest noise thresholds are not those with the lowest high-severity rate: STOP_SIGNAL concentrates roughly $4\times$ the C4/C5 share of LANE_KEEPING despite tolerating a larger $σ$. A deployable SOTIF ODD specification for driving VLAs therefore requires a two-dimensional safety envelope, not a single aggregate value per hazard.
2606.14238.paper_summary_zh: 安全認證的視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 駕駛規劃者根據 ISO 21448 (SOTIF) 的標準，依賴於一個操作設計範疇 (ODD) 規範，該規範回答了兩個互補的問題：規劃者何時開始失效，以及一旦失效，其失效程度有多嚴重？我們在 15,968 個 (clip, attack) 配對上評估了 Alpamayo R1，一個具有 10B 參數的開放權重駕駛 VLA。我們發現了一個保守的總體差距：在 15% 的平均位移誤差 (ADE) 預算下，$σ\leq 50$ 的總體安全閾值掩蓋了那些能夠容忍測試網格頂部 ($σ= 70$) 的良好取樣場景。對變更解釋子集進行的高斯混合模型 (GMM) 識別出六個離散的嚴重程度帶 (BIC 最優 $k{=}6$)，因此兩個具有相同平均誤差的擾動條件在高嚴重性 (C4/C5) 失效的比例上可能有實質差異。將兩個分析結合在同一語料庫上，顯示出一個單獨進行時都無法得出的發現：噪聲閾值最寬鬆的場景並不是高嚴重性失效率最低的場景：STOP_SIGNAL 的 C4/C5 份額大約是 LANE_KEEPING 的 $4\times$，儘管容忍了更大的 $σ$。因此，駕駛 VLA 的可部署 SOTIF ODD 規範需要一個二維安全包絡，而不是每個危害的一個單一總體值。
2606.14238.author: Abhinaw Priyadershi et.al.
